sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ سَارَةُ تَقْلِيلَ الْوَقْتِ الَّذِي تَقْضِيهِ أَمَامَ الشَّاشَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sara je odlučila smanjiti vrijeme koje provodi ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Sara decided to reduce the time she spends in front of the screen.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَشْعُرُ بِتَعَبٍ فِي عَيْنَيْهَا بِسَبَبِ الْهَاتِفِ الْمَحْمُولِ.
sentences.translation: Osjećala je umor u očima zbog mobilnog telefona.
sentences.translationEn: She was feeling tired in her eyes because of the mobile phone.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ هِيَ تَقْرَأُ الْكُتُبَ الْوَرَقِيَّةَ فِي الْمَسَاءِ بَدَلًا مِنَ التَّصَفُّحِ.
sentences.translation: Sada uveče čita papirne knjige umjesto surfanja internetom.
sentences.translationEn: Now she reads paper books in the evening instead of browsing.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ الْجَدِيدَةُ سَاعَدَتْهَا عَلَى النَّوْمِ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ova nova navika pomogla joj je da bolje spava.
sentences.translationEn: This new habit helped her sleep better.
